@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@

+# Copyright (c) 2011, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -88,0 +88,12 @@
+AC_DEFUN([FLAGS_SETUP_OBJCOPYFLAGS],
+[
+  UTIL_ARG_WITH(NAME: additional-objcopy-flags, TYPE: string,
+      DEFAULT: [],
+      DESC: [Add flags to objcopy calls],
+      OPTIONAL: true)
+
+  OBJCOPYFLAGS=$ADDITIONAL_OBJCOPY_FLAGS
+
+  AC_SUBST(OBJCOPYFLAGS)
+])
+

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
-# Copyright (c) 2011, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+# Copyright (c) 2011, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -368,0 +368,1 @@
+  FLAGS_SETUP_OBJCOPYFLAGS

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
-# Copyright (c) 2011, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+# Copyright (c) 2011, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -192,1 +192,1 @@
-	        $$($1_OBJCOPY) --only-keep-debug $$($1_TARGET) $$($1_DEBUGINFO_FILES))
+	        $$($1_OBJCOPY) $(OBJCOPYFLAGS) --only-keep-debug $$($1_TARGET) $$($1_DEBUGINFO_FILES))
